text: Does your brand have a clear mission statement that everyone in your company knows?

insight.title: Why This Matters
insight.body: Brands with a clearly articulated mission statement outperform competitors by 67% in customer loyalty metrics.

text: How confident are you that your brand message is the same across your website, social media, and advertising?

slider.hint: Consider all touchpoints: website, social profiles, email campaigns, and paid ads.

insight.title: Editorial Insight
insight.body: Consistent brand messaging can increase revenue by up to 23% by building familiarity and trust with your audience.

text: Do your customers easily understand what makes your brand different from competitors?

insight.title: Differentiation Power
insight.body: A clearly communicated unique value proposition reduces customer acquisition cost by an average of 35%.

text: Does your brand use the same logo, colors, and fonts everywhere (website, social, print)?

insight.title: Visual Consistency
insight.body: Brands that maintain visual consistency are 3.5× more likely to enjoy strong brand visibility across markets.

text: Would a customer recognize your brand just by seeing your color scheme or logo?

insight.title: Brand Recognition
insight.body: Color alone increases brand recognition by up to 80% — a critical driver of recall and intent to purchase.

text: How would you rate the professional quality of your marketing materials (flyers, emails, ads)?

slider.hint: Think about your brochures, email templates, and ad creatives.

insight.title: Quality Signal
insight.body: 75% of consumers judge a brand's credibility by its design quality. Polished materials signal authority.

text: Do you have a website?

insight.title: Digital Presence
insight.body: 81% of consumers research a business online before making a purchase. A website is your most important digital asset.

text: Does your website load quickly on both mobile and desktop?

insight.title: Speed Matters
insight.body: A 1-second delay in page load time can result in a 7% reduction in conversions and 11% fewer page views.

text: Can visitors find your contact information or make a purchase within 3 clicks?

insight.title: UX Efficiency
insight.body: The 3-click rule remains a critical usability benchmark — unnecessary friction kills conversions.

text: Does your website appear on the first page of Google for important keywords related to your business?

insight.title: SEO Authority
insight.body: 92% of all search traffic goes to results on page 1. Page 2 is effectively invisible to most users.

text: On a scale of 0–10, how well does your website explain what you do and persuade visitors to take action?

slider.hint: A great homepage answers "Who are you?", "What do you do?" and "Why should I care?" in seconds.

insight.title: Conversion Copy
insight.body: Clear value propositions on landing pages can improve conversion rates by up to 197%.

text: How often do you post on social media?

insight.title: Posting Cadence
insight.body: Brands posting consistently (3-5× per week) see 2× the organic reach growth over 6 months versus sporadic posters.

text: Do you respond to comments and messages on social media within 24 hours?

insight.title: Response Time
insight.body: 53% of customers expect a social media response within 1 hour. Brands that respond within 24 hours retain 40% more followers.

text: How would you rate the engagement (likes, comments, shares) you get on your social posts?

insight.title: Engagement Rate
insight.body: Average social engagement rates of 1–5% are considered strong for most B2C brands. Above 5% is exceptional.

text: Do you have a system to track customer questions and complaints?

insight.title: Feedback Systems
insight.body: Businesses with formal complaint resolution systems retain 70% more customers than those without structured processes.

text: Do you typically resolve customer issues within one business day?

insight.title: Resolution Speed
insight.body: Quick issue resolution is the #1 driver of customer satisfaction — more impactful than price or product quality.

text: How satisfied are your customers with their overall experience?

slider.hint: Consider feedback from reviews, surveys, and repeat purchase rates.

insight.title: CX ROI
insight.body: Brands that prioritize CX generate 60% higher profits. Every point of CSAT improvement has measurable revenue impact.

text: Do you regularly review your products or services to ensure they meet customer expectations?

insight.title: Quality Loop
insight.body: Companies that review offerings quarterly see 28% lower churn and stronger NPS scores over time.

text: Do you offer a warranty, guarantee, or return policy that builds trust?

insight.title: Trust Signals
insight.body: A clear return or guarantee policy can increase conversion rates by 17-20% by removing purchase risk.

text: How often do you update or improve your offerings based on customer feedback?

insight.title: Iteration Velocity
insight.body: Product teams that iterate based on customer feedback release improvements 3× faster with higher adoption rates.

text: Do you actively ask happy customers to leave a review on Google, Yelp, or Facebook?

insight.title: Review Generation
insight.body: 72% of consumers will leave a review if simply asked. Yet only 30% of businesses have a consistent ask strategy.

text: Do you display customer testimonials on your website or marketing materials?

insight.title: Social Proof Power
insight.body: Testimonials on landing pages can increase conversion rates by up to 34%. Trust is the new currency.

text: Do you respond to both positive and negative reviews in a professional way?

insight.title: Review Response
insight.body: Brands that respond to negative reviews see a 16% improvement in customer advocacy over time.

text: What is your average star rating on Google or other major review sites?

slider.hint: Consider your overall score across Google, Yelp, Trustpilot, and other platforms.

insight.title: Rating Impact
insight.body: Moving from a 3-star to a 4-star average can increase click-through rate from search results by up to 25%.

text: Has your brand been mentioned in any news articles, podcasts, or blogs in the past year?

insight.title: Earned Media
insight.body: Earned media coverage generates 92% more trust than paid advertising — it's the highest-value brand signal.

text: Do you have a press kit or media page on your website?

insight.title: Media Readiness
insight.body: Brands with a media kit are 3× more likely to be featured by journalists who discover them online.

text: How often do you actively pitch stories or send press releases to journalists?

insight.title: Proactive PR
insight.body: Brands that pitch consistently see 4× more media coverage than those who pitch only occasionally.

text: Do you use Google Analytics or a similar tool to track website visitors?

insight.title: Data Foundation
insight.body: You cannot optimize what you don't measure. Analytics tools are the bedrock of all growth-oriented marketing.

text: Do you know your conversion rate (e.g., how many website visitors become customers)?

insight.title: Conversion Awareness
insight.body: The average website conversion rate is 2–3%. Brands that track this actively achieve rates 2× the industry average.

text: How well do you track which marketing channels bring you the most customers?

slider.hint: Consider attribution across email, social, SEO, paid ads, and referrals.

insight.title: Attribution Mastery
insight.body: Brands with full attribution visibility reallocate 23% of budget to higher-performing channels, compounding ROI annually.
